failure_reasons.auth_required: Failed because you are not signed in.
failure_reasons.insufficient_credits: Failed because your credits were insufficient.
failure_reasons.task_limit: Failed because too many tasks are already in progress.
failure_reasons.model_unavailable: Failed because the selected model was unavailable.
failure_reasons.safety_blocked: Failed because the request may violate safety rules. Adjust the prompt and try again.
failure_reasons.service_busy: Failed because the generation service was busy. Please try again later.
failure_reasons.timeout: Failed because the generation timed out. Please try again.
failure_reasons.no_result: Failed because no usable result was returned.
failure_reasons.invalid_input: Failed because the request could not be processed. Please adjust the input and try again.
